name: Creole Seafood Gumbo from Tony Burke
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large saucepan over low heat.
2. Gradually blend in flour and cook until dark brown, stirring constantly.
3. Add liquid, okra, tomatoes, onion, green bell pepper, Tabasco sauce, thyme, and bay leaf. Bring to a boil, then cover and simmer for 30 minutes, stirring frequently.
4. Add seafood and cook, covered, for an additional 10 to 15 minutes until done.
5. Remove the bay leaf before serving in soup bowls with a mound of hot rice on top.
